message:
fix(vdbe): validate coroutine addresses and replace panicking expect() with error returns

Yield and EndCoroutine silently exited on negative register values because
`saved as usize` wrapped to a huge value, causing the top-of-loop bounds
check to return Done and truncate query results. Add the same addr < 0
validation that Return already uses.

Four `.expect()` calls in MVCC write paths (concurrent_write_page,
concurrent_track_write_conflict_page, concurrent_free_page) would panic
if write_result/track_result/free_result was None. Replace with
`.ok_or_else(|| FrankenError::Internal(...))` to return recoverable errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
